description: Camorra clan based in Trecase, Boscoreale and Boscotrecase, controlling arms and drug trafficking in the Vesuvian area and abroad. Originating from a split from the Gionta clan in the late 1970s-early 1980s, it is considered one of the richest, most powerful and ferocious Camorra clans. Its regent, Giuseppe Gallo, is a major international cocaine broker with direct contacts with South American cartels.
